name: away-mode-classification-cycle
description: User leaves home; away setback applied; 30-min classification cycle fires; setback must be maintained (not overwritten with comfort)
notes: Before Issue #85, apply_classification() would overwrite away setback with comfort temps every 30 minutes.
This scenario verifies that the classification cycle respects the away occupancy mode.
Also verifies morning wakeup is skipped when away.
Promote to golden/ once production validation confirms correct behavior.

events.note: morning classification — cool mode at 75F comfort
user leaves home — should apply cool setback (80F) after delay
30-min classification cycle fires while away — must NOT overwrite setback with comfort
another classification cycle — should still maintain setback

assertions.reason: initial classification — user is home, comfort_cool applies
away setback applied after occupancy delay — setback_cool (80F)
classification cycle while away — reapplies setback (80F), NOT comfort (75F)
